description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers for Agentic SDLC Platform. Enables GitHub Copilot secure access to local development tools.

filesystem.description: Read/write project files and generate artifacts. Core capability for accessing repository structure.

git.description: Git repository access. Enables status checks, diffs, commits, and history inspection.

terminal.description: Execute build scripts, tests, linting, and formatting. Controlled execution environment for development tasks.

github.description: GitHub integration for repository metadata, pull requests, and issues. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable.

playwright.description: Browser automation and UI testing. Enables screenshot capture, form interaction, and end-to-end testing.

optionalServers.description: Optional MCP servers. Disabled by default. Enable in 'mcpServers' section to activate.

sqlite.description: SQLite database inspection and queries. Enable when database testing is required.
sqlite.notes: To enable, move this section to mcpServers and set disabled=false

playwright.notes: This server has been moved to mcpServers and enabled. Reference moved version above.

postgresql.description: PostgreSQL database access. Enable when using PostgreSQL in production environment.
postgresql.notes: Requires environment variables: DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_NAME, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD. To enable, move to mcpServers and set disabled=false

docker.description: Docker container management. Enable when managing containerized deployments.
docker.notes: Requires Docker daemon running. To enable, move to mcpServers and set disabled=false

security.description: Global security configuration for all MCP servers.

documentation.overview: This configuration enables GitHub Copilot to securely access local development tools via Model Context Protocol (MCP). All servers run locally with sandboxing and security restrictions.
requiredServers: filesystem - Essential for reading project files and writing artifacts
git - Required for version control operations
terminal - Needed for running build/test/lint commands
github - Optional but recommended for PR/issue integration

quickStart.5_reload_vscode: Reload VS Code after modifying this file

enablingOptionalServers.playwright: Uncomment or move 'playwright' from optionalServers to mcpServers
enablingOptionalServers.sqlite: Uncomment or move 'sqlite' from optionalServers to mcpServers. Ensure database path exists.
enablingOptionalServers.postgresql: Move 'postgresql' to mcpServers. Set environment variables: DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_NAME, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD
enablingOptionalServers.docker: Move 'docker' to mcpServers. Ensure Docker daemon is running: docker ps

securityConsiderations.allowedPaths: Filesystem server only accesses specified paths. Add paths to 'allowedPaths' as needed.
securityConsiderations.restrictedPaths: Sensitive paths like .git/objects and node_modules are blocked by default.
securityConsiderations.sandboxing: All servers run in sandboxed mode with restricted capabilities.
securityConsiderations.authentication: GitHub server requires GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable.
securityConsiderations.rateLimiting: All servers have rate limits to prevent abuse.
securityConsiderations.auditLogging: All MCP access is logged to .vscode/mcp-audit.log

troubleshooting.serverNotResponding: Check that required npm package is installed: npm install -g @modelcontextprotocol/server-<name>
troubleshooting.permissionDenied: Verify that paths in allowedPaths are accessible to your user.
troubleshooting.commandNotFound: Ensure allowed commands are in PATH. Check terminal server configuration.
troubleshooting.rateLimitExceeded: Check MCP audit log. Increase rateLimits if legitimate use case.
troubleshooting.authenticationFailed: For GitHub server, ensure GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable is set and valid.

bestPractices.1: Keep disabled servers commented, don't delete them.
bestPractices.2: Use environment variables for sensitive data (tokens, passwords).
bestPractices.3: Review mcp-audit.log periodically for suspicious activity.
bestPractices.4: Test new servers individually before using in workflows.
bestPractices.5: Update MCP servers regularly: npm update -g @modelcontextprotocol/server-*
bestPractices.6: Document any custom servers or modifications to this file.
